items.text: O'Brien & Sons did a great job on our kitchen faucet. Sean said "we'll have it done by noon" and he wasn't kidding. 10/10 would recommend!
items.author: María del Carmen García-López

items.text: Fixed our "impossible" plumbing issue & didn't charge an arm & a leg. The quote said $350—we paid $350. No surprises. 👍
items.author: Tom & Jerry's Auto—Wash LLC

items.text: ¡Excelente servicio! Rápido, profesional y el precio fue justo. Recomiendo a O'Brien & Sons para cualquier reparación del hogar. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
items.author: José Ángel Muñoz
